title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report January 17 2022
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report January 17 2022
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report January 17 2022
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 17/01/2022
DCE iron ore futures market falling trends, the main contract closed 705, an decrease of 2.35% throughout the day; the quotation in themorning was decreased by 10-25 yuan/mt from last Friday. Some steel mills tended to be wait-and-see, and purchasing enthusiasm is not high. PBF at Shandong port dealt 805 yuan/mt, decreased 25-30 yuan/mt from last Friday; SSF at Shandong port dealt 508 -510 yuan/mt, decreased 10-12 yuan/mt from last Friday.
